document.name: THE POINT CDC — Youth Development Programs
document.shortDescription: Hunts Point community development center with youth development, arts, and leadership programming for neighborhood kids and teens.
document.longDescription:
THE POINT Community Development Corporation has served Hunts Point since 1994 with youth development, arts and culture, and community development. The organization's official site describes youth programming curated for different age groups, aiming to cultivate leadership and creative expression in the South Bronx.

The campus is at 940 Garrison Avenue, Bronx, NY 10474. Published hours: Monday–Friday 10:00 a.m.–6:00 p.m. (closed weekends on the site contact card). Phone (718) 542-4139; email info@thepoint.org. The site also promotes community events such as the Hunts Point Fish Parade & Arts Festival.

Sources: https://www.thepoint.org/
document.announcementDescription: Site announced no programs April 1–12, 2026; reopening April 13—verify before visiting.
